title: connected ore borders + connected budding amethyst borders
description: This resource pack simply adds connected ore borders + connected budding amethyst borders
body:
This pack adds connected ores with borders + connected budding amethyst with borders. It makes ores look better while also making them more visible in a vanilla like way.
  
Continuity(added as dependency) or optifine are required for it to work!!!
Shaders are supported.

I wanted a pack like this but nobody had one uploaded that didn't have emissive textures so I created my own
